data.name: 姊妹的侍奉
data.detailed_description:
遊戲中影片製作與授權:18cmSam
遊戲製作:貳參

◆故事

身為富二代的主角，老爸給了你一個月的期限找到適合的結婚對象。但是，等待你的不只是愛情的考驗。

兩位美麗的女僕姐妹、一位神秘的秘書，還有你那因車禍而模糊不清的回憶……當你努力經營公司、應對父親的壓力時，也將逐漸揭開過往的神秘面紗。

在商場、情場的雙重挑戰中，你能透過正確的選擇與安排找到真愛並證明自己的能力嗎？更重要的是，你能找回失落的記憶，實現高中時期那神秘的約定嗎？

一場關於愛情、責任與自我發現的豪門戀愛遊戲，等待你來揭開謎底！

◆玩法

◇每日早上可以替女僕安排工作；上班時可以選擇與女僕、秘書互動或炒股；晚上則可以選擇是否出門、在別墅裡與女僕相處，度過甜甜♀蜜蜜♂的一晚。

◇第31天會根據數值的高低，迎來截然不同的結局。

◆遊戲特色

◇100段全動態CG，多角度鏡頭，總計長度90分鐘以上

◇豐富靜態CG，含差分達50張以上

◇遊戲文本9萬5000字以上

◇ 2+1 位可攻略角色

◇遊戲結局共 7 種，含雙飛結局

清美（CV:手塚りょうこ）

一絲不苟、端莊又帶點美艷的姊姊

詩月（CV:逢真井もこ）

天真爛漫、直率可愛的嬌憨妹妹

翠桜（CV:ひむろゆり）

不請自來、精明幹練的神秘秘書

Tools for game production：Acgcreator
Tools for creating 3dcg and 3D animation ：Virtamate

data.short_description: 因公出差，我與兩位新招募的女僕姐妹花展開了為期一個月的同居生活——體貼的清美與熱情的詩月，並在數日後迎來了勾人的秘書；雖然我失了憶，但小老弟還是非常有朝氣！ 然而，在甜蜜日子來臨之際，老爸竟然嚴厲地要我盡快找人成婚？！還清空了我的存款？！這、我該如何是好？！
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文, 英文, 俄文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 日文*, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Maid Sisters' Service
data.detailed_description:
In-game videos produced and authorized by: 18cmSam
Produced by: 貳參

◆The Story

You take on the role of the protagonist, a rich kid whose father has given a month to find a suitable person to marry. However, it’s not just the test of love that awaits you.

Two beautiful maid sisters, a mysterious secretary, plus your memories that have been blurry since the car accident... As you work hard to run the company and deal with the pressure from your father, you gradually uncover the mysteries of the past.

Under the dual challenges of business and love, will you be able to find true love and prove your ability through making the right choices and arrangements? More importantly, can you retrieve your lost memories and fulfill the mysterious promise you made in high school?

A dating simulation game about love, responsibility, and self-discovery in a rich family is waiting for you to uncover the mystery!

◆Gameplay

◇ You can arrange work for the maids every morning. When you are at work, you can choose to interact with the maids, the secretary, or trade stocks; in the evening, you can choose whether to go out or stay with the maids in the villa and spend a ♀sweet♂ night.

◇ On the 31st day, you will enter completely different endings depending on the values in the game.

◆Game features

◇ 100 full-motional CG segments, multi-angle shots, a total length of more than 90 minutes

◇ A plethora of static CGs, including more than 50 differentials

◇ Game text: ca. 95,000

◇ 2+1 eligible female characters

◇ Game ending: 7 types, including a threesome ending

Kiyomi（CV:手塚りょうこ）

A meticulous, poised older sister with a touch of alluring beauty.

Shizuki（CV:逢真井もこ）

An innocent, straightforward, and adorably naïve younger sister.

Sakura（CV:ひむろゆり）

A mysterious secretary who shows up uninvited—sharp, capable, and highly efficient.

data.about_the_game:
In-game videos produced and authorized by: 18cmSam
Produced by: 貳參

◆The Story

You take on the role of the protagonist, a rich kid whose father has given a month to find a suitable person to marry. However, it’s not just the test of love that awaits you.

Two beautiful maid sisters, a mysterious secretary, plus your memories that have been blurry since the car accident... As you work hard to run the company and deal with the pressure from your father, you gradually uncover the mysteries of the past.

Under the dual challenges of business and love, will you be able to find true love and prove your ability through making the right choices and arrangements? More importantly, can you retrieve your lost memories and fulfill the mysterious promise you made in high school?

A dating simulation game about love, responsibility, and self-discovery in a rich family is waiting for you to uncover the mystery!

◆Gameplay

◇ You can arrange work for the maids every morning. When you are at work, you can choose to interact with the maids, the secretary, or trade stocks; in the evening, you can choose whether to go out or stay with the maids in the villa and spend a ♀sweet♂ night.

◇ On the 31st day, you will enter completely different endings depending on the values in the game.

◆Game features

◇ 100 full-motional CG segments, multi-angle shots, a total length of more than 90 minutes

◇ A plethora of static CGs, including more than 50 differentials

◇ Game text: ca. 95,000

◇ 2+1 eligible female characters

◇ Game ending: 7 types, including a threesome ending

Kiyomi（CV:手塚りょうこ）

A meticulous, poised older sister with a touch of alluring beauty.

Shizuki（CV:逢真井もこ）

An innocent, straightforward, and adorably naïve younger sister.

Sakura（CV:ひむろゆり）

A mysterious secretary who shows up uninvited—sharp, capable, and highly efficient.



Tools for game production：Acgcreator
Tools for creating 3dcg and 3D animation ：Virtamate

data.short_description: During a business trip, I lived with two newly recruited maid sisters—the considerate Kiyomi and the passionate Shizuki—for a month. Although I had lost my memory, my little thingy was still very energetic!
data.supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese, English, Russian, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
